summary: Weighted Causality Trust Summary testing complete. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED (trust-history API returns summary_by_source with total_value_delta/total_risk_delta per source). Frontend: All 4 profile types verified with different summary messages based on buildSummaryLine's 5-case priority logic.
critical_code_review_comments: buildSummaryLine (lines 307-408) correctly implements 5 priority-ordered cases: (1) decay-dominant, (2) risk-material, (3) mostly-shallow, (4) clear-positive-source, (5) only-decay
Case 1 fires when last 5 entries have >=4 decay entries - prioritizes 'recent changes' over historical accumulation
Case 4 correctly identifies dominant value sources from daily_action + mission_join for building user
All summaries are Hebrew, deterministic, calm tone, non-punitive (no exclamation marks)
summary_by_source API correctly returns total_value_delta and total_risk_delta per source (not count-based)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 profiles verified with correct summary rendering)

building_user.summary_text: הערך בשדה נבנה בעיקר מהצטרפות למשימה ומפעולת כיוון יומית.

fragile_user.summary_text: הדעיכה היומית משפיעה על האמון — פעולות חדשות יחזקו את המצב.

restricted_user.summary_text: הדעיכה היומית משפיעה על האמון — פעולות חדשות יחזקו את המצב.
